scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w shared && npm run dev -w server
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build -w shared && npm run start -w mobile
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
